title: Roasted Smoky Portuguese Chicken Skewers
description: A jammy, crunchy, and adventurous Portuguese dish featuring pecan nuts and a smoky flavor, perfect for those looking for a Whole30-friendly meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Thread the coated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken skewers and sprinkle with chopped pecan nuts.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, mix the lemon juice and chopped parsley in a small bowl.
After the chicken has cooked, brush the lemon juice and parsley mixture over the skewers.
Return the skewers to the oven and roast for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until slightly caramelized.
